detail.description: Miles Mastrobuoni grounds out, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Miles Mastrobuoni grounds out, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Miles Mastrobuoni flies out to center fielder Dylan Crews.

Miles Mastrobuoni grounds into a force out, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Miles Mastrobuoni advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.
Miles Mastrobuoni flies out to center fielder Jacob Young.
Miles Mastrobuoni singles on a ground ball to left fielder James Wood. Miles Mastrobuoni out at 2nd on the throw, left fielder James Wood to second baseman Jorbit Vivas.
Miles Mastrobuoni out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Dylan Crews. Dominic Canzone scores.
Miles Mastrobuoni singles on a line drive to right fielder Leody Taveras.
Miles Mastrobuoni grounds out, first baseman Pete Alonso to pitcher Kyle Bradish.
Miles Mastrobuoni singles on a ground ball to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Miles Mastrobuoni lines out to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Miles Mastrobuoni flies out to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Miles Mastrobuoni singles on a ground ball to center fielder Colton Cowser. Victor Robles to 2nd.
Miles Mastrobuoni singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Miles Mastrobuoni out on a sacrifice bunt, third baseman Blaze Alexander to second baseman Jackson Holliday. Victor Robles to 3rd. Colt Emerson to 2nd.
Miles Mastrobuoni lines out to center fielder Jonny DeLuca.
Miles Mastrobuoni grounds out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Miles Mastrobuoni flies out to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
